conflictBlocks.oursContent:
// inventory-ish fields (for ServiceTitan materials/equipment tabs)
    cost: "cost",
    unitcost: "cost",
    uom: "unit",
    unit: "unit",
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
// Some exports use RetailPrice as the standard price field.
    retailprice: "default_price",

    // variants / ids (strict mappings)
    id: "st_id",
    serviceid: "st_parent_id",
    materialid: "st_parent_id",
    equipmentid: "st_parent_id",
    parentid: "st_parent_id",
    variantname: "variant_name",
    isdefault: "is_default_variant",
    isprimary: "is_default_variant",

preservedBehaviors.description: normalizeHeaderKey lowercases, strips whitespace and non-alphanumeric chars
getCanonicalKey maps isActive/Active/Enabled/Status to is_active for any target
Products target maps standard name, SKU, and category headers
Products target maps stock, reorder, price, image, and item_type headers
Pricebook fuzzy matchers for static price, member price, addon price, and standard/base/retail/total price
Pricebook strict map contains name, sku, description, st_type, category, and default_price entries
toBoolean parses truthy/falsy strings and returns configurable default
toNumber handles US/EU currency formats, accounting negatives, and non-parseable fallbacks
Pricebook fuzzy matcher maps unitcost-with-suffixes and bare cost to cost
Pricebook fuzzy matcher maps uom and unit to unit
Pricebook strict map includes cost, unitcost, itemcost, cogs -> cost
Pricebook strict map includes uom and unit -> unit
Pricebook fuzzy matcher maps id and *itemid to st_id
Pricebook fuzzy matcher maps serviceid/materialid/equipmentid/parentid to st_parent_id
Pricebook fuzzy matcher maps variantname (including suffixed) to variant_name
Pricebook fuzzy matcher maps isdefault/isdefaultvariant/isprimary to is_default_variant
Pricebook strict map includes id, serviceid, materialid, equipmentid, parentid, variantname, isdefault, isprimary
Pricebook strict map maps retailprice to default_price
